rules: Root brain/ is authoritative for agent brains.
Root system/ is authoritative for workflow rules.
Root schemas/ is authoritative for JSON schemas.
dashboard must not maintain duplicate source-of-truth brain files.
legacy paths may be read only through adapters, never as primary truth.
Schemas at root schemas/ are authoritative. Dashboard src/schemas may import but not override.
Campaign path must use pitch-jobs/ prefix, not campaigns/ prefix.
API routes in dashboard/src/app/api/ are authoritative. Legacy pages/api/ are deprecated.
Core libraries in dashboard/src/lib/ are authoritative. Root lib/ is legacy/reference.
migrationNotes: Old markdown files in pitch-jobs/{slug} are reference only, not stage completion markers.
JSON output files in outputs/ subfolder are required for stage completion.
Legacy brain files in dashboard/src/brain/ should not be loaded by resolver.
